source.section: Part 10 - Offence: Weapons & Armament > 2 - Air-to-Ground Weapons > 2.3 - Rockets

steps.action: Go in SMS (Stores Management System) page
Select desired rocket pods; « 68R » stands for LAU-68 rocket launcher pod. In our case, text should be boxed when selected.
Select desired Firing mode Option (SGL for Single, SAL for Salvo)
Set desired Rocket Motor (MTR) Type (M4 or M66)
Set Rocket Mode to CCIP (text should be boxed) Rocket Reticle Pipper CCIP Mode Selected Rockets Selected & Armed Rockets Remaining
Set center of gun reticle on target and wait for the « IN RNG » (In Range) cue to appear.
Press the Weapon Release button (« RALT+ SPACE ») to fire rockets
Once you have done your run and the Breakaway X appears, break off the attack and wave off from target. In Range Cue Breakaway X
